title: LM_RENEWAL_NOTIFICATION
text: LM_RENEWAL_NOTIFICATION This option determines the notification period before a Uniface license lease needs to be renewed (by connecting to the internet). During this period, Uniface displays a notification message in a dialog box every time the application is started (unless this option is set to 0 or LM_NOTIFICATION_POSTMESSAGE is set). LM_NOTIFICATION = NumberOfDays NumberOfDays —any value from 0 (license expiration message is never displayed) through to 30 . If omitted or set to a value less than 0 , the default value is 3 . If set to a value greater than 30 , the maximum value of 30 is used. Any other value generates an error message and informs the user that the value will be set to the default. LM_RENEWAL_NOTIFICATION also accepts On and Off, true and false. On/true defaults to 30 days, Off/false is the same as 0. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
